title: Bradford Protein Determination – Microplate Format (Thermo Fisher Pierce)
author: Thermo Fisher Scientific

steps.title: Prepare BSA Dilution Series
steps.instruction: Prepare a BSA dilution series with concentrations of 0, 125, 250, 500, 750, 1000, 1500, and 2000 µg/mL. Ensure the BSA is diluted in the same buffer as your samples to reduce buffer interference effects. Pipette 10 µL of each dilution per well.

steps.title: Add Coomassie Reagent
steps.instruction: Pipette 300 µL of Pierce Coomassie Plus Reagent into each well.

steps.title: Incubate with Mixing
steps.instruction: Incubate the plate at room temperature for 10 minutes with gentle orbital mixing at 200 rpm. This longer incubation improves linearity at higher protein concentrations.

steps.title: Read Absorbance
steps.instruction: Read the absorbance of the plate at 595 nm. The color is stable for up to 60 minutes.

steps.title: Analyze Data
steps.instruction: Construct a standard curve, subtract the background absorbance using the 0 µg/mL well, and calculate the protein concentrations of your samples.
